data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for milestone-based billing (% complete invoicing). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for milestone-based billing but fails to provide any supporting evidence or endpoints that demonstrate its implementation, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of milestone-based billing (% complete invoicing) being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for milestone-based billing
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the milestone-based billing functionality.
